task: Self-mentioning bug + thread tracker + rule consolidation
what_worked: Xiaosong pointed out self-mention bug, fixed immediately
Built thread-tracker.json with reaction-based closure detection
what_failed: Was @mentioning self (U0AHN84GJGG) in thread replies — nonsensical
Thread tracker initially only checked text keywords, missed emoji reactions
Tracker didn't filter by Admin's own reactions vs anyone's
lesson: 1) Never @mention yourself. 2) Thread closure = Admin's own check react only. 3) Rules scattered across 7+ files = drift. Consolidate to shared/context/.
user_feedback: Xiaosong asked 3 follow-up questions pushing for deeper root cause and better tracking
